title: Ragada
subTitle: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.

title: Action Blaster
subTitle: Anil Anto, a TV operator, moves to Kochi with his pregnant wife in order to start a new life. There, Anil crosses paths with Darvin, a gangster, post an unfortunate incident.

title: Veeram The Powerman
subTitle: A fearless young man vows to mend his violent ways after falling in love with a beautiful maiden. However, he is forced to resort to violence after a gang of nefarious criminals pursue his lady love.

title: Dashing Jigarwala 2
subTitle: When the students of the Travancore Maharaja College start to form gangs and engage in crime and brutal fights, Edward Livingston, an English professor decides to restore order in the campus.

title: Dhruva
subTitle: A committed police officer, Dhruva, uncovers a web of organised crime headed by a scientist, Siddharth Abhimanyu. But when Dhruva tries to build a case against him, he faces many challenges.

title: Angel
subTitle: Nani discovers a rare antique idol from the excavation site at Amaravati. He wants to sell it and keep the money for himself, but before he can do that, the idol goes missing.

title: Jaguar
subTitle: Krishna, an orphan medical student, lives a seemingly ordinary life. However, unbeknownst to people, he is a vigilante named Jaguar who pursues a certain group of people in order to kill them.

title: Yudh Ek Jung
subTitle: Chandu, a supermarket employee, encounters trouble when he decides to help Indu, an aspiring actress, and gets embroiled in a murder case.

title: Maargan
subTitle: A serial killer targets women with a strange serum that turns their bodies black. Subsequently, a high-ranking police officer sets out to catch the culprit.

title: Sangharsh Aur Vijay
subTitle: Badri is the protector of Badrinath temple. However, when a woman falls in love with him, his guru decides against making Badri his successor.

title: Meri Saugandh
subTitle: Ramu loves Lakshmi, whose father is the chief of the village. In order to prove his love, Ramu must win a challenge posed by a rival village and beat Giridhar, who is also keen on marrying Lakshmi.

title: Meri Saugandh
subTitle: Ramu loves Lakshmi, whose father is the chief of the village. In order to prove his love, Ramu must win a challenge posed by a rival village and beat Giridhar, who is also keen on marrying Lakshmi.

title: Bunglow No 17
subTitle: Gautham and Deeksha, along with their daughter, move into an isolated bungalow gifted to them by Gautham's father. Soon, they start experiencing paranormal activities around the house.

title: Vasco The Rebel
subTitle: With unwavering support from his lover, a defiant young man carves his way into the mafia world. His journey takes a turn when a relentless police officer pursues him.

title: Burra Katha
subTitle: With two brains and two voices in one body. Abhiram faces chaos in love and life as Abhi and Ram struggle for control, testing his heart and identity along the way.

title: Boss
subTitle: Disowned by his father as a boy, Surya seeks protection from a crime boss. When his brother is wrongfully sent to prison, his father begs him to intervene.

title: Bogan
subTitle: A police officer probes a seasoned robber, oblivious to his hidden power, which allows him to possess people through eye contact.

title: Meri Taqat Mera Faisla
subTitle: A young man follows in his father's footsteps by working for the welfare of the people living in his district. However, a corrupt politician threatens to thwart his plans.

title: Jawaan
subTitle: Azad fights against the systemic oppression of society. Soon, he finds himself in a web of deceit and crime as he teams up with a group of allies to take down a ruthless arms dealer.

title: Surya's Saturday
subTitle: Surya, a young man with anger issues, channels his emotions on Saturdays, because of a promise to his deceased mother. However, things get complicated when he decides to confront a corrupt cop.

title: My Boss Bajrangbali
subTitle: A corrupt politician kills Anji's parents and plans to demolish a temple. Later, Lord Hanuman takes human form to help Anji fight the politician.

title: My Boss Bajrangbali
subTitle: A corrupt politician kills Anji's parents and plans to demolish a temple. Later, Lord Hanuman takes human form to help Anji fight the politician.

title: Das Ki Dhamkee
subTitle: Bizarre circumstances surround a waiter who is asked to pretend as the late owner of the pharmaceutical company, as he is his doppelganger.

title: Dharam Adhikari
subTitle: Dharamraj, a righteous man, manages his village's affairs justly, making him well-liked among the people. Irked by his popularity, a jealous Chaudhary and Shastri conspire to get rid of him.

title: Mufti
subTitle: Gana, a police officer, must go undercover to find and kill Bhairathi Ranagal, a crime lord. However, when he realises that Bhairathi's intentions are good, he needs to decide his next step.

title: Cadaver
subTitle: When two surgeons mysteriously get murdered by Vetri, a prisoner, the responsibility of locating his accomplice falls on the shoulders of a pathologist.

title: Gajaana
subTitle: On an adventurous search for treasure in the dense forest, a group of young explorers soon discovers they have become the quarry.

title: Seetharama Kalyana
subTitle: Arya, a righteous man, falls in love with a small-town woman named Geetha, unaware of the obstacles that lie ahead for both of them.

title: Garam
subTitle: Varala, a jobless young man, leaves his home to prove himself to his father. However, before achieving his goal, he falls in love with Sameera and tries to woo and save her from gangster Biju.

title: Main hoon Surya Singham 2
subTitle: An undercover police officer works in a school and tries to put an end to the criminal activities of two criminals who rule the area.

title: Super Khiladi Returns
subTitle: Guru hatches several plans to separate Priya and her lover Thirukumaran. However, Thirukumaran successfully manages to escape from Guru's evil plans and traps him in another problem.
